description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on every pull request. Use a matrix strategy to test a Python package on multiple Python versions (3.6 to 3.10) and platforms (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest). For each job, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version, install dependencies with pip and poetry, and run tests and linters. Additionally, install pinentry on macOS and upload coverage to Codecov on Linux.
